_comment: Merge these entries into your ~/.claude/settings.json. Do NOT replace the file — preserve your existing permissions, enabledPlugins, etc. The hook commands assume the plugin is installed at the default plugin path; adjust paths if needed.

_optional_recommended_permissions._comment: OPTIONAL defence-in-depth, not required. The plugin does NOT impose permissions (denying git push globally would affect all your work). The Phase 5 push is already gated by the skill's single push prompt. If you want a mechanical backstop, merge the contents of `permissions` below into your settings.json `permissions` block (append to existing deny/ask arrays — do not replace them).

_optional_userpromptsubmit._comment: Uncomment this block if you want non-bundled tools (third-party reviewers, free-form review prompts) to be informed when an auto-task history folder exists for the current branch. Off by default to avoid token overhead on unrelated prompts.
